mapper.select: SELECT dp.deposit_product_id AS depositId, dp.kor_co_nm AS bankName, dp.fin_prdt_nm AS productName, do.intr_rate AS basicRate, do.intr_rate2 AS maxRate, fc.company_image AS companyImage FROM deposit_product dp JOIN deposit_option do ON dp.deposit_product_id = do.deposit_product_id JOIN financial_companies fc ON dp.fin_id = fc.fin_id WHERE dp.persona_id = #{personaId}
